checklists.title: BOH Opening — Mad Benji
items: How to unlock doors
Where to get keys or if the key will be passed on to them – and if it is passed down, explain responsibility of it – sensibility etc. – what time we need to be here
Where to turn on lights and exhausts – exhausts must be turned on
How to turn grill on – 开锅,
Wipe down with water, turn grill on, leave it on for a bit then oil evenly.
How to turn fryer on
Explain why we turn these two on first – longer time to heat up
Check if we need to top up oil – within the two lines
How to open dressing bench condiments area – were to put the lids etc
How to set up stations
Utensils on grill section – 2x Spades, thongs, egg rings, bacon press
Utensils on fryer section – thongs, timers, baskets
Utensils on dressing bench – chopping boards, spoons, thongs and wet cloth
Help front of house open front – if necessary
Put money back in till box
Organize tasks and to do list for the day
See what prep/back ups needs to be done
Check cleaning schedule
Check what deliveries will be coming today and if space needs to be organised
Organize the day and set the pace

checklists.title: BOH Closing — Mad Benji
items: [General Keepings] Explain what time we close instore customers and uber tablets etcfc.
[General Keepings] Explain what time we can begin to prepare to close – start as soon as its not busy – washing, prepping back ups, rubbish runs etc.
[General Keepings] Divide to sections – washer and grill/dressing area etc.
[General Keepings] Show how to use tablets and enter orders – refer to Front Of House Entering Order
[General Keepings] Mopping – Wet mop then dry mop
[General Keepings] End of day balance – how to count and where to put cash drop
[General Keepings] Closing standards – cleanliness of things etc.
[Dressing Bench] Explain how we can generally start cleaning this section at an earlier time
[Dressing Bench] What needs to be wiped down and how to wipe it down – edges, rims etc
[Dressing Bench] Check backups – ensure back ups are down to aid tomorrow’s service
[Dressing Bench] Write down anything that is not done
[Dressing Bench] After closing time – then we can begin closing it
[Dressing Bench] What to do with spoons and condiments – if they need to be put away and where to
[Dressing Bench] How to glad wrap section and put lids back on
[Dressing Bench] How to wipe down stainless steel surfaces with hot water, soap and scrub
[Dressing Bench] Unsure area is clean and spotless
[Grill Section] Explain how grill can only be turned off after closing time – not a minute earlier
[Grill Section] But some utensils can be washed early
[Grill Section] Explain how to turn off grill
[Grill Section] Grill shoud’ve been on low if there wasn’t any orders to allow faster cooldown
[Grill Section] Cold water to cool the grill down
[Grill Section] How to clean it
[Grill Section] What chemicals we use and where to get it – Detergent and Washing Soda
[Grill Section] Remembering to wear gloves as the grill and steam is hot
[Grill Section] How to scrub it and making sure all black spots are cleaned
[Grill Section] Rinse it down with water and making sure that all chemicals are washed off
[Grill Section] Making sure all around the grill is cleaned to – including bottom
[Grill Section] Wiped everything with clean cloth again to ensure no stain, grease or chemical residuals
[Grill Section] Ensuring the rest of the grill section and surroundings are cleaned
[Grill Section] Grease tray under grill area must be washed every night
[Grill Section] One person pretty much focuses on these two area
[Fryer] Explain how the fryer can only be turned off after closing time
[Fryer] Unless there were two fryers on and then we can turn one off first if its not busy to speed up closing process
[Fryer] Explain how to turn fryers off
[Fryer] How to check oil usability – visibility etc
[Fryer] How to use filter machine
[Fryer] Where to find it
[Fryer] How to change oil paper – making sure all edges are covered
[Fryer] How to position the net – ensuring the right side is hooked on to avoid hazard
[Fryer] How to filter the oil
[Fryer] How to connect pipe
[Fryer] Need to bring middle net up to aid cleaning -网
[Fryer] How to connect power and turn on machine
[Fryer] Ensuring all areas are washed and cleaned – no crumbs left – including sides and edges – be careful around the temperature wiring area
[Fryer] How long oil should be filtered for depending on usability
[Fryer] How to close pipes and disconnect it – let oil residuals drip out and use cloth to help disconnect it as it is hot
[Fryer] Where to throw oil and how to do it
[Fryer] Ensuring all fryers are turned off properly
[Fryer] Ensuring all surfaces are wiped and cleaned
[Fryer] How to alternate between fryers if not both are turned on all the time

checklists.title: BOH Cleaning — Mad Benji
items: Explain the setup of cleaning – what needs to be done
Show checklists – explain how it works – explain the objective of the list
Explain order of procedure – how to be most efficient with time
Explain it is very important to clean and wash well
Show how containers, utensils etc should be placed
Sweep the floor
Show how to turn off fryers
Show how to filter oil – and how to use time effectively while filtering oil – washing*
Show how to set up oil machine – how to install filter paper – which dryer to filter first
How to use the oil machine – how to clean the scraps around– using the filter net
Explain while waiting oil to get filled up – continue washing
Show how to mop the floor – what chemicals to use – hot water – wet mop then dry mop
Rubbish – where the bin is
Show pictures on how closing should look like at the end

checklists.title: FOH Opening — Mad Benji
items: Explain opening time and responsibilities – everything needs to be ready by 11; tables, chairs, lights, till etc.
Wipe down all tables and chairs to ensure missed crumbs – floor too etc.
Check if there’s any urgent prep/backups that needs to be done
Make a list/mental note of the thing that needs to be done or stations that need to be cleaned – eg. Urgent preps to be done first, cut buns first etc.
Fill up drink bottles
Polish cutleries
Put away dishes
Fill up station preps
Preps –
Bacon, cheese, fruits, icecream, sotdrink etc.
Cleaning – follow cleaning schedule

checklists.title: FOH Closing — Mad Benji
items: Explain what time we close instore customers and uber tablets etcfc.
Explain what time we can begin to prepare to close – As soon as it’s not busy
Start washing dishes and drink bottles early through the night
Start giving empty tables and chairs a wipe down and making a mental note of which tables are wiped to avoid doing it twice – with sanitizer and hot cloth
Can begin sweeping floor if there’s no customers – cannot sweep if there’s customers in shop
Making sure all prep and back ups are done to aid tomorrow’s operation
Explain all stations must be cleaned
Drinks station
Milkshake machine must be wiped down every night – especially top and metal edge/rim parts to avoid milk solids build up
Blenders and the machine – machine must be wiped down too
Juicer – how to disassemble and wash – juice 网plate to be washed in kitchen, all parts must be scrubbed clean with hot water and metal scourer to avoid fruit solids to build up
Ice-cream fridge to be wiped down – hot to remove top glass to clean properly
Beer tap area – need to see how to wash first***
Expediting area and window
Making sure all areas are cleaned and wiped down – no food crumbs
Counter area
All tablets are charged
Area is tidy and organized
All stainless steel area to be wiped down with hot water and soap sponge
All other surface area are wiped down with hot cloth and sanitizer
Everything has a home – put things back to its respective places – don’t leave it around – be initiative and responsible
Dining area
Make sure all tables, chairs and bench area wiped and cleaned
Stack chairs up on table to aid sweeping and mopping
Chairs cannot be up before closing time – not a minute earlier
Floor is sweeped before mopping – clean floor makes it easier to mop – make sure all edges and corners are sweeeped
Mopping the floor – wet mop then dry mop – ensure to get all crumbs off the floor – becareful while mopping, it gets slippery
Ask kitchen boys to mix mop water for you – use FOH mop
Need to buy 2 mops***
Explain that closing should be done within reasonable timeframe
Emergenct – light box – fire – emergency light box(90)

checklists.title: FOH Prep — Mad Benji
items: Show prep list and explain order to do it – most efficient order to do things
Buns should be cut early during the day to avoid cluster of space
FIFO – softdrinks, fruits etc.
Labeling of dates
Where to find stuff and where to do it
What happen when things run out/ nearly run out – let kitchen know
Everything has a home, things should be put back to their respective places
Always clean up after tasks
Hand basin is for hand washing only*
